/.title: Rapid Manufacturing Australia — From Prototype to Production
/.description: Precision manufacturing services in Australia. CNC machining, sheet metal fabrication, 3D printing, injection molding and more. Audited global supplier network. Request a quote in 2 business days.

/capabilities.title: Manufacturing Capabilities — Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/capabilities.description: Full range of advanced manufacturing capabilities including CNC milling, turning, EDM, wire EDM, precision grinding, die casting, laser cutting, 3D printing and more.

/contact.title: Contact Us — Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/contact.description: Get in touch with Rapid Manufacturing. Email sales@rapidmanufacturing.com.au or fill in our contact form for precision manufacturing enquiries.

/quote.title: Request a Quote — Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/quote.description: Upload your design files for a free DFM analysis. Quotations provided within 2 business days from our audited Australian and international supplier network.

/service/cnc-milling.title: CNC Milling | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/cnc-milling.description: 3 to 5-axis precision CNC milling for complex geometries. Aluminium, steel, titanium, plastics. Tolerances to ±0.01mm. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/cnc-turning.title: CNC Turning | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/cnc-turning.description: 2 to 5-axis precision turning with live tooling. Aluminium, steel, titanium, Inconel. Tolerances to ±0.01mm. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/precision-grinding.title: Precision Grinding | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/precision-grinding.description: Surface, cylindrical, and centreless grinding. Tolerances to ±0.002mm. Surface finish to Ra 0.2µm. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/5-axis-machining.title: 5-Axis Machining | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/5-axis-machining.description: Simultaneous 5-axis contouring for complex aerospace and medical components. Tolerances to ±0.01mm. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/edm.title: EDM Machining | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/edm.description: Electrical Discharge Machining for hardened materials. Dies, moulds, aerospace components. Tolerances to ±0.005mm. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/wire-edm.title: Wire EDM | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/wire-edm.description: Intricate 2D profiles and taper cuts with no cutting force. Tolerances to ±0.002mm. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/gear-and-spline-cutting.title: Gear & Spline Cutting | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/gear-and-spline-cutting.description: Gear hobbing, shaping, and profile grinding for spur, helical, and worm gears. DIN and AGMA standards. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/die-casting.title: Die Casting | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/die-casting.description: High-pressure aluminium and zinc die casting for high-volume production. Min 500 pieces. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/aluminum-extrusion.title: Aluminum Extrusion | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/aluminum-extrusion.description: Standard and custom aluminium extrusion profiles. 6061, 6063, 7075 alloys. Anodising and powder coating. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/injection-molding.title: Injection Molding | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/injection-molding.description: Thermoplastic injection molding for high-volume plastic parts. ABS, PP, PC, Nylon, PEEK. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/laser-cutting.title: Laser Cutting | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/laser-cutting.description: Fibre and CO₂ laser cutting for precision sheet metal. Steel, stainless, aluminium up to 25mm. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/sheet-metal-fabrication.title: Sheet Metal Fabrication | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/sheet-metal-fabrication.description: Laser cutting, CNC bending, welding, and powder coating. 0.5–10mm thickness. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/cmm-inspection.title: CMM Inspection | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/cmm-inspection.description: Coordinate Measuring Machine inspection with full GD&T reporting. Accuracy to 1 micron. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.

/service/3d-printing.title: 3D Printing | Rapid Manufacturing Australia
/service/3d-printing.description: SLA, SLS, FDM, and metal 3D printing. Resins, nylon, titanium, aluminium. From 24 hours. Sourced from our global network of audited suppliers.
